# jans_scopes_by_type (Data Source)

Data source for looking up OAuth scopes by their scope type (GET /scopes/type/{type}).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `scope_type` (String) The scope type to look up (e.g. openid, dynamic, spontaneous, uma).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `scopes` (List of Object) The scopes of the given type. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scopes))

<a id="nestedatt--scopes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scopes`

Read-Only:

- `creator_id` (String)
- `creator_type` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `dn` (String)
- `inum` (String)
- `scope_id` (String)
- `scope_type` (String)
